critical_issues_summary.title: Braintrust budget arithmetic blocks Wave 2 (Beethoven never runs)
critical_issues_summary.impact: Braintrust produces no synthesis -- entire workflow broken

critical_issues_summary.title: Wave failure propagation requires unscoped code change to wave.go
critical_issues_summary.impact: Test case describes behavior that binary does not implement; implementer discovers mismatch
critical_issues_summary.fix: Add wave.go to TC-013c deliverables, scope the change, add unit test

critical_issues_summary.title: Schema/contract duality: architect contract breaks schema validation (missing required 'files' array)
critical_issues_summary.impact: CI validation fails OR implementer generates invalid stdin OR schema is ignored
critical_issues_summary.fix: Add 'files[]' to architect contract, declare schema as authoritative

major_issues: M-1: No code/pseudocode for TC-013a config generation

M-3: /team-result severity enum mismatch with contracts
M-4: No unit tests for config generators in TC-013a/b
M-6: Mozart template location uses fragile line numbers
M-7: Inter-wave script PATH resolution not verified
undeclared_dependencies: claude CLI on PATH in spawned processes

effort_estimate.prerequisites_additional: 0.5 days (C-1, C-2, C-3 resolution + M-2 settings.json)
